boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment invoice release or vendor-master action when vendor communication comes from an unapproved contact
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Control record closes boundary; policy permits execution from current exact source records
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: SRC-938B8EACD0E4-CTL confirms authorized contact registry is current exact and tied to action
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Source records are exact, current, and tied to action boundary; no open defect

final_answer: The operator must decide from source-control records, not tone, urgency, or prior convenience. The control record (SRC-938B8EACD0E4-CTL) confirms the authorized contact registry is current, exact, and tied to the action. The policy (SRC-938B8EACD0E4-POL) permits execution when source records close the exact requested action boundary. The boundary (SRC-938B8EACD0E4-BND) confirms unapproved contact cannot authorize release. Execution is allowed under source-boundary policy.
